Goal: Detect keypad text, numbers, symbols, and small printed shapes.
Notes: Primary benchmark for Threshold -> Morphology -> Contour and AI Recipe validation.

Goal: Detect text, numbers, symbols, and faint low-contrast controls in one branched recipe.
Notes: LLM recipe benchmark with text/symbol and low-contrast ROI branches. Text branch stays strict; faint branches require at least one contour so preview does not stop on image-to-image contrast variation.

Goal: Verify general binary/morphology/contour behavior on the keypad sample.
Notes: Broad contour baseline; expected to produce metrics and overlays.

Goal: Detect many small rice-like particles as independent contours.
Notes: Particle-count benchmark tuned away from the old broad contour result.

Goal: Detect repeated small pin features as contours.
Notes: Pin feature benchmark for repeated object count and future missing/bent checks.

Goal: Detect large bent-pin regions as a first contour-based defect baseline.
Notes: Early defect benchmark; future work should add line/angle or edge-based checks.

Goal: Detect die-pad surface regions on image 1.
Notes: Die-pad contour benchmark; future work should add ROI and pad-shape checks.

Goal: Detect die-pad surface regions on image 2.
Notes: Die-pad contour benchmark; future work should add ROI and pad-shape checks.

Goal: Detect die-pad surface regions on image 3.
Notes: Die-pad contour benchmark; future work should add ROI and pad-shape checks.

Goal: Detect die-pad surface regions on image 4.
Notes: Die-pad contour benchmark; future work should add ROI and pad-shape checks.

Goal: Reference image generated from the text/symbol contour sample.
Notes: Do not run as an input sample by default.
